title: Field of Man-Sized Holes
description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, [jitter]gouged with large outlines of bodies[/jitter], stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

[sine][orange]It's perfect...[/orange][/sine]

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Normality[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

conditions: All players must have at least one card that can be enchanted with Perfect Fit
notes: This event features a multi-page structure with different flavor text based on which option you choose. The [gold]Resist[/gold] path presents text about walking past the holes and questioning your choice, while the [purple]Enter Your Hole[/purple] path shows you descending into darkness and emerging unchanged but enlightened. Mechanically: Resist removes 2 cards from your deck and adds 1 Normality curse (net -1 card slot). Enter Your Hole enchants a single card with Perfect Fit (level 1), with the game prompting you to select a valid target from your deck.
